updateNote: Day 56 5:07 PM PT refresh: Lebanon ceasefire extended 3 weeks at White House. Hezbollah rockets at Shtula — all intercepted (first ceasefire rocket attack on Israeli territory). Israeli strikes kill 3 in Shoukine, wound 2 in Yater. Two IDF Air Force soldiers indicted for spying for Iran (F-15 data). Pentagon removes 15 wounded from casualty count (Intercept). 30+ nations hold military planning conference at UK Northwood for multinational Hormuz reopening. Coordinated Iranian unity statement: 'no radicals or moderates.' EU widens sanctions on 19 officials for Hormuz. CSIS: US expended ~50% of Patriot interceptors, 850+ Tomahawks. Trump: 'don't rush me,' no time frame. Gas higher 'for a little while.' Brent $103.38 (+29.5%), WTI $94.46 (+25.1%). Gas $4.03.
